{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323042421968CED28F1344B83A4DE"}"},"total":8997},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6996559700381123363","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我读过的最令我身心舒畅的一本书了，作者行文流畅，逻辑通顺，一点也不拖泥带水，无女主，不后宫，文中主角也并没有过度的依赖于系统，没有扮猪吃虎类拖拖拉拉的情节，而且最令我有好感的是，文中的配角也都是情商在线，性格不错的人，有的年少轻狂，有的壮志凌云，主角更是义比云天。文中也常有伏笔和悬念的出现，使文章情节跌宕起伏，令人不由得称奇。在太虚道界出现后，我本以为主角会延着太虚道界着条路一直走到底，和之前看过的二流垃圾文无异，却没想到后面突增奇变，将主线又转回了真实世界，并借此引出了一系列的事情，不仅使主角的实力在此事件中得到飞跃般的提升，而四大天王在那一眼便能看到死的日子里的种种表现也让我们看见了人生百态。作者可谓是巧夺天工，仿佛知道我们对一件事的新鲜感能持续多久，松弛有度，此文章是值得一看的好文。","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":11,"text":"舒畅","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%88%92%E7%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742110614B83A4DE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226996559700381123363%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226969109758439590949%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%88%92%E7%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":117,"s":113,"text":"年少轻狂","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B9%B4%E5%B0%91%E8%BD%BB%E7%8B%82&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742110614B83A4DE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226996559700381123363%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226969109758439590949%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B9%B4%E5%B0%91%E8%BD%BB%E7%8B%82%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1629013501,"group_id":"6969109758439590949","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6DcwUVBTBs5uICLyVloljw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/c08f2cde2175442fbb62fc4a0389cfc5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789213&x-signature=Sg%2FSH5XDmSp5TVtZukRuBkCMcjY%3D","user_id":"102009034245","user_name":"一只羊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102009034245","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6969109758439590949","book_info":{"abstract":"陈清禹穿越到荒古大界，成为万古圣王世家嫡子，开局签到天罡三十六变大神通，获得无上修行天赋！
但这才刚刚开始：
签到九转金丹，混沌青莲子，鸿蒙灵根，吞了就能修为暴涨，境界飙升！
签到造化玉牒，阴阳天书，三千大道，可任意修行！
签到天地玲珑玄黄宝塔，持之，无人可破其防御！
签到盘古真身，得至强攻伐之能，可横推一切敌！
…………
